query: 北陸地方で泊まれる古民家を教えて
reasoning: Two constraint violations share one root cause (RULE B): tool scoped to Ishikawa only (Hokuriku = Ishikawa + Toyama + Fukui at minimum), and no kominka lodging-type filter applied. The returned results are real, confirmed hotels/ryokan but none are classified as 古民家 — the specific accommodation type requested is entirely absent. constraint_handling and intent_understanding both score 2 for this same defect; other dims are scored on the authoritative data that was returned.
missing_data: 古民家 / machiya type lodging entries across all three Hokuriku prefectures (Ishikawa, Toyama, Fukui); get_hotels calls for Toyama and Fukui prefectures are also missing.
improvement_hint: Add a lodging_type filter parameter to get_hotels supporting 'kominka' / 'machiya' types, and fan out the Hokuriku region query across Ishikawa + Toyama + Fukui (or support a region-level argument). Tagging hotels with kominka/machiya lodging_type in the dataset would enable this filtering.
